inputs.name: competitors
inputs.description: Competitor websites to monitor, one per line

inputs.name: marketing_goals
inputs.placeholder:
Increase signups
Improve SEO
Launch new feature
inputs.description: Your top marketing goals, one per line

weekly-seo-audit.description: Weekly SEO health check — crawls your site, identifies issues, and delivers a prioritized report every Monday morning

activities.intent: Crawl the site and collect technical SEO data
steps: Use nebo-seo binary to crawl the site and extract meta tags, headings, links, and schema markup
Check robots.txt and sitemap.xml for issues
Measure Core Web Vitals for top pages

activities.intent: Interpret crawl results and identify top issues by business impact
steps: Analyze crawl data for broken links, missing meta tags, duplicate content, and thin pages
Score each issue by potential traffic impact
Identify the top 5 issues ranked by business impact

activities.intent: Generate a prioritized SEO health report
steps: Generate SEO Health Score (0-100) based on crawl findings
Produce markdown report with score, top issues, and specific fix instructions for each
Compare against last week's score to show trend

daily-content-review.description: Daily review of drafted content for quality, brand voice, and SEO before publishing

activities.intent: Collect all new or updated content drafts
steps: Check the user's drafts folder or connected content platforms for new or updated content
Load the product-marketing-context for brand voice reference
List all drafts found with their status and last modified time

activities.intent: Review each draft for copy quality, brand voice, and SEO
steps: Check grammar, clarity, and readability for each draft
Verify brand voice consistency against product-marketing-context
Check on-page SEO: title tag, meta description, heading structure, keyword usage
Flag any claims that need verification or sources

activities.intent: Summarize review findings with specific edit suggestions
steps: For each draft, produce a summary: overall quality score, top issues, specific suggested edits
Prioritize edits by impact on readability and SEO
Flag any drafts that are ready to publish as-is

monthly-cro-report.description: Monthly audit of top landing pages for conversion rate optimization opportunities

activities.intent: Find the top landing pages by traffic volume
steps: Pull top 5 landing pages by traffic from analytics or sitemap
Gather current conversion rates for each page if available
Note any pages with high traffic but low conversion as priority targets

activities.intent: Run CRO analysis on each top page
steps: Load each page via browser and audit: headline clarity, CTA visibility, social proof, friction points
Check forms for unnecessary fields and conversion blockers
Evaluate use of persuasion principles: social proof, urgency, trust signals
Score each page on a 1-5 scale across headline, CTA, proof, friction, and mobile experience

activities.intent: Produce a prioritized CRO report with expected impact and effort
steps: Rank all findings by expected conversion lift
For each recommendation: describe the change, expected impact, and effort level (quick win, medium, major project)
Include before/after examples for the top 3 changes
Compare against last month's report to show progress

campaign-launch.description: Guided end-to-end campaign launch — from positioning through tracking setup

activities.intent: Align on audience, value proposition, and messaging for this campaign
steps: Load product-marketing-context for baseline positioning
Define the campaign audience segment and their primary pain point
Craft the core campaign message and value proposition
Identify the key persuasion angle for this audience

activities.intent: Write campaign copy for landing page, email, and ads
steps: Write landing page copy: headline, subheadline, body sections, CTA
Write primary email announcement copy
Write 3 ad copy variations with different angles (pain, gain, social proof)

activities.intent: Generate landing page content with CRO best practices
steps: Structure landing page sections: hero, problem, solution, social proof, features, FAQ, CTA
Apply CRO best practices to each section
Design exit-intent or scroll-triggered popup for the page if appropriate

activities.intent: Build a nurture email sequence for campaign leads
steps: Design a 4-5 email nurture sequence: welcome, value, social proof, urgency, final CTA
Write subject lines and body copy for each email
Define timing and exit conditions

activities.intent: Set up paid ad campaign structure and creative
steps: Recommend platform and campaign structure based on audience and budget
Define targeting, bidding strategy, and budget allocation
Generate 5 headline and 3 description variants for ads
Suggest image and video creative direction

activities.intent: Set up conversion tracking for the campaign
steps: Define conversion events to track (page view, form submit, purchase)
Generate UTM parameter templates for all campaign links
Set up A/B test framework for landing page and email variants
Create a measurement plan with success criteria

competitor-alert.description: Monitors competitor websites for pricing, feature, and messaging changes

activities.intent: Fetch current competitor pages for comparison
steps: Use nebo-scraper binary to fetch competitor pricing, features, and homepage content
Extract key data points: pricing tiers, feature lists, messaging, CTAs

activities.intent: Compare current scrape against previous version to detect changes
steps: Load the last scrape from memory
Diff against current scrape to identify meaningful changes
Filter out noise (date changes, minor formatting) and flag substantive changes

activities.intent: Notify the user if meaningful competitor changes were detected
steps: If changes detected: summarize what changed and the strategic implications
Recommend whether any response is needed and what it should be
Save current scrape to memory for next comparison

lead-nurture.description: Automatically qualifies and nurtures new leads when a form is submitted

activities.intent: Assess lead quality from submitted form data
steps: Extract lead data from the form submission event
Score the lead based on demographic and behavioral signals
Classify as high, medium, or low priority based on fit with ideal customer profile

activities.intent: Select or create the appropriate nurture email sequence
steps: Match the lead to an existing nurture sequence based on their segment
If no matching sequence exists, create one tailored to their profile
Set timing and exit conditions for the sequence

activities.intent: Customize the first email based on lead data and brand context
steps: Personalize the first email using the lead's name, company, and expressed interest
Align messaging with product-marketing-context positioning
Queue the email for sending
